title: Lemon Crispy British Broccoli Afternoon Tea
description: Citrusy, crispy broccoli wrapped in whole wheat ssam wraps, perfect for a quick weeknight British afternoon tea.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 C and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Wash the purple sprouting broccoli and cut into bite-sized florets.
In a bowl, toss the broccoli with olive oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, sea salt, black pepper until evenly coated.
Spread the seasoned broccoli on the prepared baking sheet and roast for 15 minutes, turning halfway through, until crisp and slightly charred.
While the broccoli roasts, warm the ssam wraps on a dry skillet for 30 seconds on each side; keep them flexible.
In a small bowl, whisk honey and a pinch of sea salt to make a quick glaze.
Assemble each wrap by placing a handful of roasted broccoli, slices of cucumber, and red bell pepper, then drizzle with the honey glaze.
Fold the wrap into a ssam-style roll, slice in half, and serve immediately with a squeeze of fresh lemon.
